title: Law of  Marriage (Forms and Fees) Regulations, 1971
title_en: Law of  Marriage (Forms and Fees) Regulations, 1971

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Law of Marriage (Forms and Fees) Regulations.

provisions.title: Forms
provisions.content: The forms set out in the First Schedule hereto shall be used in the cases to which they are applicable, with such variations as circumstances may require.

provisions.title: Fees
provisions.content: The fees specified in the Second Schedule hereto shall be payable for the several matters to which they are applicable. First Schedule Forms [Editorial note: The forms have not been reproduced.] Second Schedule (Regulation 3) Fees Shs. 1. On application for licence to conduct marriages 1,000/- 2. Application for licensing of place for celebration of marriage 10,000/- 3. On application for Registrar-General's special licence and issue thereof 3,000/- 4. Issue of original Marriage Certificate 500/- 5. For certifying copy on an entry in a register of marriage 600/- 6. On application for registration of a foreign marriage 500/- 7. On application for specification of religion 3,000/- 8. For celebration of civil marriage 1,000/- 9. On application for registration of subsisting unregistered marriage 500/- 10. Search in register of marriages for each entry 100/- 11. For certifying copy of an entry in the Register of Annulments and Divorces, for each entry 500/- 12. Search in the Register of Annulments and Divorces, for each entry 100/- 13. Registration of endorsement of conversion of marriage 500/- 14. Certificate of no impediment 50,000/- 15. Application for licensing of place of celebration 10,000/- 16.
